properties.name: Camp Lemonnier (Djibouti)
properties.description: Principale base US permanente en Afrique (CJTF-HOA). 4500 militaires. Drones, C-130, P-8 Poseidon.

properties.name: Diego Garcia (BIOT)
properties.description: Base strategique US-UK ocean Indien. B-2, B-52, SSBN. Gestion future contestee (Maurice-UK 2024).

properties.name: Manda Bay (Kenya)
properties.description: Base avancee US anti-Shabaab Somalie. Attaquee al-Shabaab janv 2020 (3 US tues).

properties.name: Garoua (Cameroun)
properties.description: Base aerienne support US ops anti-Boko Haram/ISWAP bassin du lac Tchad. Drones, ISR.

properties.name: Sao Tome (acces)
properties.description: Accord d'acces US-Sao Tome 2024 pour missions Atlantique. Contrepoids a Bata (Chine).

properties.name: Air Base 201 Agadez (Niger — retrait 2024)
properties.description: Base drones US Niger. Retrait force aout 2024 apres coup 2023. Symbol perte d'influence US Sahel.

properties.name: Seychelles (drones MQ-9)
properties.description: Operations drones MQ-9 Reaper anti-piraterie et ISR. Base depuis 2009.

properties.name: Cooperation Tunisie
properties.description: Base aerienne Remada + acces Bizerte. Cooperation bilaterale anti-terroriste Sahel.

properties.name: Dakar (APS - African Partnership Station)
properties.description: Base logistique periodique US Navy. Exercices anti-piraterie Obangame + Phoenix Express.
